business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction operations with corporate offices, equipment yard/warehouse, fabrication shop, branch office, and equipment storage

positives: Four of five locations are sprinklered
Majority of buildings are Fire Resistive, Non-Combustible, or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Experienced driver roster with average tenure exceeding 15 years
concerns: LOC-005 Equipment Storage in Cranberry Township is not sprinklered
Elevated Workers' Compensation claim frequency (35 claims)
Claim count trending upward in recent policy years (15 claims in 2021, 13 in 2024)
